objective: Add the explicitly non-publishable Lane A state `internal-reference-prototype` between adversarial-review-passed and production-reference-derived: it permits PRIVATE renderer/CSS previews after exact variant verification, minimum evidence review, manually reviewed masks, and critic review; it must never permit production publication, capture-validated claims, rights bypass, or approved-asset overwrite.
current_state: Lane A ladder: hypothesis -> exact-variant-verified -> public-reference-supported -> reference-assets-proposed -> reference-profile-fitted -> adversarial-review-passed -> production-reference-derived. Publication gate accepts only reference labels AND currently fails closed entirely for the reference lane.
assumptions: Digest compatibility rules from ADR-0002 hold: no change may alter serialized physical events or any existing reference event; inserting a state before production-reference-derived changes the reference rank map — existing reference ledgers exist only in private bundles at hypothesis, so the rank insertion is safe; document this reasoning in the ADR amendment.
acceptance_criteria: ReferenceState gains INTERNAL_REFERENCE_PROTOTYPE between ADVERSARIAL_REVIEW_PASSED and PRODUCTION_REFERENCE_DERIVED; human-only with named technical_reviewer; requires an adversarial_review reference and an evidence packet on the transition.

The publication gate (review.py) continues to reject internal-reference-prototype profiles for publication with an explicit 'internal preview only, non-publishable' error; production-reference-derived remains the only publication-label state and remains fail-closed pending the bundle-review adapter.
The golden 1.0.0 digest pin test passes unedited; physical lane untouched byte-for-byte.
check-evidence-packet accepts internal-reference-prototype as a legitimate state token and as a reference-lane to_state.
Docs (AGENTS.md ladder block, approval-state-machine.md, ADR-0002 amendment note) updated consistently.

Tests: agent refused at the new state; human with reviewer+critic-ref+packet accepted; publication of an internal-reference-prototype profile rejected; demotion from and re-promotion to the state works.
required_tests: uv run pytest tests/test_promotion.py tests/test_review.py tests/test_agent_gates.py
uv run ruff check src tests
stop_conditions: Any pre-existing test needs behavioral modification.
The rank insertion would break any existing ledger replay.
